message:
Migrate modal state to useModalState and fix card loading violations (#4384)

Migrate 4 components to useModalState hook. Fix card loading in
ProactiveGPUNodeHealthMonitor (add isRefreshing, guard isLoading)
and CrossClusterPolicyComparison (wire isFailed/consecutiveFailures).

Ratchet counts: 77->75 violations, 54->52 failure violations.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -391,6 +391,7 @@ function ProactiveGPUNodeHealthMonitorInternal() {
   const {
     nodes,
     isLoading,
+    isRefreshing,
     isDemoFallback,
     isFailed,
     consecutiveFailures,
@@ -413,7 +414,8 @@ function ProactiveGPUNodeHealthMonitorInternal() {
 
   // Report loading state to CardWrapper (lastRefresh enables "Updated Xm ago" freshness display)
   useCardLoadingState({
-    isLoading,
+    isLoading: isLoading && nodes.length === 0,
+    isRefreshing,
     hasAnyData: nodes.length > 0,
     isFailed,
     consecutiveFailures,
